sources.codul_fiscal: Fiscal Code (Law 227/2015, amended by GEO 89/2025 and GEO 8/2026)
sources.omfp_1802: OMFP 1802/2014 — Accounting regulations aligned with EU directives
sources.legea_239: Law 239/2025 — Share capital changes and financial statement penalties

tva.title: Value Added Tax (VAT) 2026
tva.cota_standard: Standard VAT rate: 21% (increased from 19%, per Law 141/2025)
tva.cota_redusa: Single reduced rate: 11% (replaces 5% and 9% rates, per Law 141/2025)
tva.cota_tranzitorie: Transitional 9% rate for housing (until 31.07.2026, with conditions)
tva.plafon_scutire: VAT exemption threshold: 395,000 RON (increased from 300,000, per EU Directive 2020/285)
tva.plafon_incasare: Cash-basis VAT threshold: 5,000,000 RON (increased by GEO 8/2026, rises to 5,500,000 in 2027)
tva.deadline_d300: D300 VAT return due monthly by the 25th. Form 300 modified by Order 174/2026.
tva.e_factura: RO e-Invoice: transmission deadline 5 business days from issuance (extended by GEO 89/2025). Mandatory B2B and B2C.
tva.e_tva: RO e-VAT: Pre-filled VAT return by ANAF from e-Invoice + cash register data. Verified via SPV portal.

profit_tax.title: Corporate Income Tax 2026
profit_tax.rate: Corporate income tax rate: 16% (Art. 13-46 Fiscal Code)
profit_tax.micro: Micro-enterprises: flat 1% rate (simplified by GEO 89/2025). Threshold: 100,000 EUR (~509,850 RON). Conditions: min. 1 employee, shareholders max 25% in other micro-enterprises.
profit_tax.deadline: D101 — quarterly, by the 25th of the month following quarter end
profit_tax.dividende: Dividend tax: 16% (increased from 10%, effective 01.01.2026, per Law 141/2025)
profit_tax.mijloace_fixe: Minimum value for depreciable fixed assets: 5,000 RON (increased from 2,500 RON by GEO 8/2026)

salary.cam: CAM (work insurance contribution): 2.25% — borne by employer

saft.title: SAF-T (Declaration 406) 2026
saft.descriere: Standard Audit File for Tax — mandatory for all taxpayers from 2026, no grace periods.
saft.periodicitate_lunar: Monthly — for companies with monthly VAT returns. Deadline: last calendar day of following month.
saft.periodicitate_trimestrial: Quarterly — for companies with quarterly VAT returns or non-VAT payers.
saft.active: Asset reporting: annually, at financial statement filing date.
saft.stocuri: Stock reporting: only upon ANAF request, minimum 30-day deadline.

bilant.title: Annual Financial Statements 2025
bilant.termen: 150 days from year-end = June 2, 2026 (May 31 is Sunday, June 1 is holiday). Order 2,036/2026.
bilant.continut: Balance sheet, P&L, Explanatory notes, Directors' report, Responsibility statement
bilant.sanctiuni: Delay > 5 months: ANAF declares company fiscally inactive (Law 239/2025). Inactive 1 year: dissolution at Trade Registry.

capital_social.title: Minimum Share Capital 2026
capital_social.srl_existent: Existing LLCs with turnover > 400,000 RON: must increase to 5,000 RON (2-year deadline)
capital_social.cont_bancar: Mandatory payment account at Romanian bank or Treasury from 01.01.2026

fiscal_calendar.d101: D101 (Corporate income tax) — quarterly, by the 25th
fiscal_calendar.d406_lunar: D406 SAF-T monthly — last calendar day of following month
fiscal_calendar.d406_trimestrial: D406 SAF-T quarterly — last calendar day of month following quarter
fiscal_calendar.bonificatie: 3% discount for paying 2025 obligations by April 15, 2026
